title: Project Miner Local Field Prep Conversation Agenda Disclosure Controls
objective: Reduce day-to-day PM workbench scan burden by wrapping only the existing /pm-review/import-intake Local field prep conversation agenda panel in a browser-native, default-open disclosure control while preserving its placement inside Field Prep Detail, aria label, heading, derived pill, summary text, seven agenda items, item order, status pills, dynamic derived behavior, export inclusion, no-storage behavior, no-authority wording, read seams, and no-authority boundary.
active_role: Technical Repo Authority / PM Product Coordinator / AI Orchestration Usability Implementer
implemented_scope: Convert the existing Local field prep conversation agenda panel wrapper to a native default-open disclosure control.
Preserve the Local field prep conversation agenda aria label, heading, and derived pill.
Keep the panel inside Field Prep Detail after the Local field prep coverage snapshot and before the Local field observation scratchpad.
Preserve the existing seven agenda items, item order, summary text, status pills, dynamic derived behavior, export inclusion, no-storage behavior, and no-authority wording.

Preserve existing storage behavior, read seams, route links, quick-jump rail, output actions, output statuses, helper disclosures, detail disclosures, handoff-guide disclosure, workflow-map disclosure, open-items disclosure, snapshot disclosure, operating-queue disclosure, import-exception-register disclosure, workflow-gates disclosure, exception/decision detail disclosure, admission/approval contract disclosure, local-review-checklist disclosure, local-approval-decision-draft disclosure, local-executor-closeout disclosure, local-field-readiness disclosure, local-field-questions disclosure, local-field-prep-queue disclosure, and local-field-prep-coverage disclosure.

Add focused smoke coverage proving default-open state, collapse/reopen behavior, hidden/visible agenda controls, seven agenda-control cards, no disclosure-state localStorage keys before agenda export use, unchanged initial and later agenda counts, and continued PM Lane 083 authority guard posture.
Update PM lane operating docs, project status, packet, and handoff.
sidecar_result: A read-only sidecar from PM Lane 105 recommended PM Lane 106 as Project Miner Local Field Prep Conversation Agenda Disclosure Controls. The recommendation was accepted as a browser-local AI/orchestration field-prep ergonomics slice. A separate read-only PM Lane 107 scout completed during this tranche and recommended Project Miner Local Field Observation Scratchpad Disclosure Controls as the next tiny non-overlapping lane. The scout made no edits, staged nothing, ran no validation, and did not touch Supabase, Render, Vercel, Olares, live services, macros, source-domain files, workbook files, staging, or commits.
allowed_actions: Modify the local operations-web import-intake page Local field prep conversation agenda panel wrapper markup.
Modify focused operations-web smoke tests for default-open local-field-prep-agenda disclosure controls and no persisted collapse state.
Update PM lane operating docs, project status, packet, and handoff.
Run focused local validation, commit, push, and restore host parity.

No field prep agenda item detail change.
No field prep agenda item count change.
No field prep agenda status pill change.
No field prep agenda dynamic derived-state behavior change.
No field prep agenda export inclusion change.

No DNS, auth, ingress, or secret change.
